text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 1 day(s), and nothing is improving — I'm very worried.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Cough with some yellowish mucus and a dull chest ache for 5 day(s), though I notice it's not improving.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I came down quite suddenly with a high fever, muscle aches all over, and a persistent dry cough. 8 day(s) and barely functioning, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: influenza/mild

text: Worst flu I've ever had. Bedridden, can't eat, spiking temperatures, every muscle hurts. 13 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Productive cough and slightly short of breath climbing stairs. 10 day(s) like this.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I've had a mild headache and some tiredness, nothing serious.
label: non-infectious

text: I've had a mild headache and some tiredness, nothing serious.
label: non-infectious

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 16 day(s) in, though it seems to be slowly resolving. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Cough with some yellowish mucus and a dull chest ache for 17 day(s).
label: pneumonia/moderate
